quote: An individual has not begun to live until he can rise above the narrow horizons of his particular individualistic concerns to the broader concerns of all humanity.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.
source_outlet: Conquering Self-Centeredness, Dexter Avenue Baptist Church, 1957

quote: O, see how the masses of men worry themselves into nameless graves, while here and there, some great unselfish soul forgets himself into immortality.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.
source_outlet: MLK quoting Emerson in Conquering Self-Centeredness, 1957

quote: All reality hinges on moral foundations. There are moral laws of the universe just as abiding as the physical laws.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.
source_outlet: Rediscovering Lost Values, Second Baptist Church Detroit, 1954

quote: The great problem facing modern man is that the means by which we live have outdistanced the spiritual ends for which we live.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quote: Religion operates not only on the vertical plane but also on the horizontal. It seeks not only to integrate men with God but to integrate men with men.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quote: Returning hate for hate multiplies hate, adding deeper darkness to a night already devoid of stars.
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quote: For the great enemy of the truth is very often not the lie — deliberate, contrived, and dishonest — but the myth — persistent, persuasive, and unrealistic.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: We enjoy the comfort of opinion without the discomfort of thought.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: When power leads man toward arrogance, poetry reminds him of his limitations. When power narrows the areas of man's concern, poetry reminds him of the richness and diversity of his existence. When power corrupts, poetry cleanses.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: The artist, however faithful to his personal vision of reality, becomes the last champion of the individual mind and sensibility against an intrusive society and an officious state.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: For peace is a process — a way of solving problems.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: The courage of life is often a less dramatic spectacle than the courage of a final moment; but it is no less a magnificent mixture of triumph and tragedy.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: Possession make you rich? I don't have that type of richness. My richness is life, forever.
author: Bob Marley

quote: I don't have an army behind me. If I did, I wouldn't care, I'd just get more militant. I talk from strength.
author: Bob Marley
source_outlet: Mojo: Bob Marley, The Last Crusade

quote: I would give up everything to have good health.
author: Kurt Cobain

quote: I never wanted to sing. I just wanted to play rhythm guitar — hide in the back and just play.
author: Kurt Cobain

quote: If a person is having some kind of turmoil in their lives, it's usually reflected in the music, and sometimes it's pretty beneficial.
author: Kurt Cobain

quote: I'm a much happier guy than a lot of people think I am.
author: Kurt Cobain

quote: As a solo artist there needs to be a lot of fiction involved to some degree. It's harder to step outside of yourself and look back and say 'What is this guy singing about?'
author: Chris Cornell

quote: The way that I got perspective was a process of elimination, as opposed to when you're working in a band and you're just bouncing off of each other.
author: Chris Cornell

quote: Records shouldn't be difficult to make — one shouldn't be afraid of the outcome.
author: Chris Cornell

quote: It would be difficult to devote so much time and effort if things stayed the same; that would be like coal mining.
author: Chris Cornell

quote: I could do whatever I would like to do. I just had to get something going, which would constantly change, so that I didn't end up institutionalized.
author: Robert Plant

quote: When I listen to it, I wonder whether the guy who was singing and writing the lyrics ever had a rest.
author: Robert Plant

quote: You don't have any perspective at the time, you just joyously careen through another bunch of ideas.
author: Robert Plant

quote: Entertainment is fine so long as the person that you're entertaining most of all is yourself.
author: Robert Plant

quote: I can't look back and complain or be smug now. I feel OK about stuff.
author: Robert Plant

quote: Music wouldn't lie to me, or leave me.
author: James Hetfield
source_outlet: Rolling Stone: Don't Tread On Me, 1993

quote: You have to be true to yourself, write what you feel. When people see that you're full of shit, then it's over.
author: James Hetfield
source_outlet: Rolling Stone: Don't Tread On Me, 1993

quote: We've all discovered there is freedom through structure.
author: James Hetfield

quote: When I'm happy, I'm writing the heaviest riff possible.
author: James Hetfield
source_outlet: Metal Hammer (via Louder Sound reprint), June 2009

quote: I feel like a tragic hero in a Shakespeare play.
author: Tupac Shakur
source_outlet: Entertainment Weekly, March 1994 (via Blank on Blank)

quote: I have no friends. I have no resting place. I never sleep. I can never close my eyes.
author: Tupac Shakur
source_outlet: Entertainment Weekly, March 1994 (via Blank on Blank)

quote: I'm in jail now, but I'm free. My mind is free. The only time I have problems is when I sleep.
author: Tupac Shakur

quote: I don't have no fear of death. My only fear is coming back reincarnated.
author: Tupac Shakur

quote: Hip-hop saved my life, man. It's the only thing I've ever been even decent at.
author: Eminem

quote: I just want her and my immediate family to have things I didn't have: love and material things.
author: Eminem

quote: Music is my outlet, my kids are my life, so there's a balance in my life right now that couldn't be better.
author: Eminem

quote: I'm tryin' to find my own identity and you're stuck in that whole thing of, who am I as a person?
author: Eminem

quote: I reached a certain level of maturity that hopefully includes a happy medium of immaturity.
author: Eminem

quote: Imagine how many people are on the planet. How can everybody love you?
author: Eminem

quote: As an artist, you need the naysayers and the nonbelievers to add fuel to your creative fire.
author: Ice-T
source_outlet: Ice: A Memoir of Gangster Life and Redemption (2011)

quote: You have to embrace your evolution.
author: Ice-T
source_outlet: Rolling Stone: Ice-T on Going Straight

quote: Rap is really funny, man. But if you don't see that it's funny, it will scare the shit out of you.
author: Ice-T

quote: Hip-hop, before it was all about talking about hard shit, it was like, how clever are you, how damn near funny can you be?
author: Ice Cube

quote: Rap music is a school system itself, and one of the best school systems that we have. It's entertainment, but it's also a school system.
author: Ice Cube
source_outlet: Nappy Happy: Angela Davis interviews Ice Cube, Transition 58 (1992)

quote: The hero and the coward feel exactly the same, but you have to have the discipline to do what a hero does.
author: Mike Tyson

quote: Life is not about accumulation, life is about loss. The older you get, the more loss you experience.
author: Mike Tyson

quote: Man is not meant to be humble, he's meant to be humbled.
author: Mike Tyson

quote: I don't believe in the word 'legacy.' I just think that's another word for ego. I'm just passing through. I'm gonna die and it's gonna be over.
author: Mike Tyson

quote: I can't help anyone if I'm not well myself, and I desperately want to get well. I have a lot of pain and I just want to heal.
author: Mike Tyson

quote: I think everybody's coping with the same shit. It's just life. You live a long life, and then you die.
author: Vince Staples

quote: Life is perspective-based; your perspective can change everything. If you have the wrong perspective it can fuck you.
author: Vince Staples

quote: I didn't feel connected to hip-hop growing up. I never wanted a chain or a mansion. I just wanted niggas to stop dying.
author: Vince Staples

quote: When you act regular, they treat you regular.
author: Vince Staples

quote: I learned many great lessons from my father, not the least of which was that you can fail at what you don't want, so you might as well take a chance on doing what you love.
author: Jim Carrey

quote: The effect you have on others is the most valuable currency there is.
author: Jim Carrey

quote: You will only ever have two choices: love or fear. Choose love, and don't ever let fear turn you against your playful heart.
author: Jim Carrey

quote: Hope is a beggar. Hope walks through the fire. Faith leaps over it.
author: Jim Carrey

quote: All there will ever be is what's happening here, and the decisions we make in this moment, which are based in either love or fear.
author: Jim Carrey

quote: My daughter was just born and now she's in school. They grow up so fast.
author: John Candy
source_outlet: John Candy: I Like Me (2025, archival footage)

quote: This is a real place, these are real people around me. You got responsibilities. I chose that life.
author: John Candy
source_outlet: John Candy: I Like Me (2025, archival footage)

quote: All the good comics think they're a hack. All the good comics hate their own routines.
author: Ronny Chieng

quote: I'd rather put out something good once in a while than having to churn out just average stuff every single day.
author: Ronny Chieng

quote: The true job of comedians these days as professionals is to not overreact to other people overreacting.
author: Ronny Chieng

quote: We were already joining the circus when all our friends were working at the bank or at a law firm. Why would we start worrying as though we're working office jobs — we're circus performers.
author: Ronny Chieng

quote: The more I do it, the more I realized I'm kind of glad that stand-up comedy is so separate to Hollywood.
author: Ronny Chieng

quote: I just wanted to tell you why I grieve, but why I don't despair.
author: Jon Stewart

quote: The view from my apartment was the World Trade Center. Now it's gone. The view from the south of Manhattan is the Statue of Liberty. You can't beat that.
author: Jon Stewart

quote: If we amplify everything, we hear nothing.
author: Jon Stewart

quote: The best defense against bullshit is vigilance. So if you smell something, say something.
author: Jon Stewart

quote: As a professional comedian, it's my theory that people get into comedy because there's something missing in their own personal life, and they need that void filled through laughter and acceptance onstage.
author: Jon Stewart

quote: I can't follow something that is not going to make me feel right with myself.
author: DJ Premier
source_outlet: Red Bull Music Academy: You Know My Steez, 2007

quote: You've got to be different in order to stand out. People might not get it right away, but they'll eventually get it if you believe in what you're doing.
author: DJ Premier

quote: If you don't really care about the history of hip-hop culture, don't mess with it.
author: DJ Premier

quote: My lowest point, my deepest, darkest, depressed state that I've ever been in was my most famous, my most wealthy, my most known.
author: Logic

quote: I've come to truly realize that social media, personally, destroys me.
author: Logic

quote: My mental health struggles and my family history filled with addiction, abuse, and neglect is what shaped me creatively. I found art as a way to express myself and heal.
author: Logic

quote: Confusion is a gift from God. Those times when you feel most desperate for a solution, sit. Wait. The information will become clear.
author: RZA

quote: Chess is a game where you die on the board, you don't die in reality. That's what it is I think we like about it also in hip-hop.
author: RZA

quote: I practice to improve myself. I try to practice blitz games, so that my brain can move faster.
author: RZA

quote: The body is a vehicle for the mind.
author: RZA

quote: It's a new world order, you know what I mean? And one must adapt to that.
author: Ol' Dirty Bastard

quote: You can't just jump into this arena. Everyone is talented and there's a ton of them out there in this world, but you still have to do the work to be taken seriously.
author: Method Man

quote: I wouldn't call it nervous, but butterflies always play a major role for me. In my eyes, butterflies are a sign of growth.
author: Method Man

quote: Sometimes I feel like I have to walk in there butt ass naked, metaphorically speaking. Like I gotta be stripped of everything down to my original state just so they could take me seriously.
author: Method Man

quote: The scariest moment is always just before you start. After that, things can only get better.
author: Stephen King
source_outlet: On Writing: A Memoir of the Craft (Scribner, 2000)

quote: Life isn't a support system for art. It's the other way around.
author: Stephen King
source_outlet: On Writing: A Memoir of the Craft (Scribner, 2000), p. 94

quote: The rest of it — and perhaps the best of it — is a permission slip: you can, you should, and if you're brave enough to start, you will.
author: Stephen King
source_outlet: On Writing: A Memoir of the Craft (Scribner, 2000)

quote: Whatever is going on with me at the time will find its way into the piece. It has to, or the piece isn't worth making.
author: Quentin Tarantino

quote: A writer should have this little voice inside saying, 'Tell the truth. Tell the truth. Reveal a few secrets in here.'
author: Quentin Tarantino

quote: I like to hold for as long as I can before I have to cut, and then when I do cut, I want it to fucking mean something.
author: Quentin Tarantino

quote: The heartbeat of the movie has to be a human heartbeat.
author: Quentin Tarantino

quote: It's a heartbreaking process. It's a little masochistic and heartbreaking to write this stuff that you're really happy with, and then not put it in.
author: Quentin Tarantino

quote: The passages you have to labor over are invariably worse than the ones that seem to write themselves.
author: Paul Thomas Anderson

quote: I often write scenes without knowing where they're gonna go, and as I write I start acting and sort of improvising.
author: Paul Thomas Anderson

quote: Once you start writing and you're alone in a room and you get in a groove, there's nothing else going on in the world.
author: Paul Thomas Anderson

quote: There's only two places I want to be and that's with my family or making a movie.
author: Paul Thomas Anderson

quote: I don't have a crystal ball. I fucking love doing this. I can't see myself losing that love.
author: Paul Thomas Anderson
